since_last: 28% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads -0.06%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.04% · BTC +0.37% · Gold +0.70% · Nasdaq100 -1.46%. 28% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at -0.06%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at -0.06%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.56%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -13.00%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +5.74%, SKHY +3.33%, CSCO +2.44%, HPE +2.08%, DELL +2.06%. Laggards: ISRG -13.00%, PUBM -6.75%, AMAT -5.69%, MDB -4.65%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.94% at $125.94
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.94% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
